calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-04-2019 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-04-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day having been assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Loretta Najera, CSR #5153. Telephone: 415-551-3717. Email: lnajera@sftc.org.

Keri Salet, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of America, N.A.
George Garcia, Officer - Opeartions Consultant for plaintiff Bank of America, N.A., was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Jason Hom.
Plaintiff's complaint was filed on March 27, 2018.
Defendant Jason Hom's answer to plaintiff's complaint was filed on May 14, 2018.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was served on October 19, 2018.

Plaintiff submitted to the following evidence for the Court's review:

Exhibit A: Copies of billing statements from 11/16 through 12/17......................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Bank of America, N.A., and against defendant Jason Hom, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $6,496.90.
Costs - $344.50.
Total - $6,841.40.

Proposed Judgment After Court Trial was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Counsel STIPULATES to the return of admitted plaintiff's Exhibit A.

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jan-10-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Stanley Apps, Esq. 310-709-3966 of the Law Offices of Robert S. Gitmeid & Assoc. for Moving party.
No other Appearance.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

LAW OFFICE OF ROBERT GITMEID, AND ATTY. STANLEY R. APPS' MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL.

Granted.

Moving party to submit a proposed order on the mandatory judicial Council Form that is verbatim with the Court's ruling.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-19-2018 Set For Trial On Mar-04-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Off Calendar Nov-01-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Anthony J. Dipiero, Esq., Hunt & Henriques, Telephone (408) 362-2276, Appearing for Plaintiff, (CourtCall);

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted;

No opposition filed; motion granted. The RFAs will be deemed admitted unless code compliant responses are served at or before the hearing on this matter.

Order signed

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)
